en_title: University Gives Students Up to $15K in Scholarships for Rare Gaming Achievements
cn_title: 硅谷大学设奖学金：稀有游戏成就最高奖1.5万美元(约合人民币10万元)
subtitle: 游戏成就也能换奖学金
opus_summary: 硅谷大学推出最高成就奖学金，学生凭《最终幻想14》《哈迪斯》等游戏稀有成就，每学期最高可获5000美元(约合人民币3万元)，优秀玩家还能获得更多学年资助。

paragraphs.en: The University of Silicon Valley is turning heads for its unique scholarship program, which awards thousands of dollars to students who can prove their leet gaming skills.
paragraphs.cn: 硅谷大学独特的奖学金项目引发关注，为能证明自己游戏技术高超的学生提供数千美元奖励。

paragraphs.en: Some colleges have esports programs, while others offer game development courses. The University of Silicon Valley has a few of those, too — but they also have a ‘ Max Achievement Scholarship ,’ which is turning heads across the internet due to its unusual requirements.
paragraphs.cn: 一些大学设有电竞项目，另一些开设游戏开发课程。硅谷大学同样提供这些项目，但还设有「最高成就奖学金」，因要求独特而在网上引发热议。

paragraphs.en: More specifically, USV is awarding scholarship money to students who are really good at games. A wide variety of titles are on offer, including MMORPGs like Final Fantasy XIV and Old School Runescape , Roguelikes like Hades and Risk of Rain 2 , Sandbox games like Minecraft , and many more.
paragraphs.cn: 具体而言，USV会向游戏水平出众的学生发放奖学金，涵盖多种作品，包括《最终幻想14》和《老派RuneScape》等MMORPG、《哈迪斯》和《雨中冒险2》等肉鸽游戏、《我的世界》等沙盒游戏，以及更多作品。

paragraphs.en: To earn the scholarship cash, students must prove they’ve earned specific in-game achievements across two separate tiers: Mastery and Legendary. Mastery earns students up to $2,500 per term, while Legendary nets them up to $5,000 per term, with each year consisting of three terms.
paragraphs.cn: 要获得奖学金，学生必须证明自己在游戏中取得了两个等级的特定成就：Mastery（精通）和Legendary（传奇）。Mastery每学期最高可得2500美元(约合人民币2万元)，Legendary每学期最高可得5000美元(约合人民币3万元)，每学年分为三个学期。

paragraphs.en: For example, they can submit their achievement for Old School RuneScape by getting Max Cape (earned after getting all 24 skills to level 99). In Final Fantasy XIV, players can submit for Legendary Tier by getting all 20 combat jobs and 8 crafter/gatherer jobs to level 100.
paragraphs.cn: 例如，在《老派RuneScape》中获得Max Cape（需要将全部24项技能升至99级）即可提交成就。在《最终幻想14》中，玩家将20个战斗职业和8个制作/采集职业全部升至100级后，可申请传奇等级。

paragraphs.en: While this might seem like an odd means of financial assistance, USV argues this scholarship rewards “the same qualities that drive academic excellence: disciplined practice, strategic problem-solving, and the pursuit of mastery beyond minimum requirements.”
paragraphs.cn: 这或许看起来不是寻常的经济援助方式，但USV认为，该奖学金奖励的是「推动学业卓越的同样品质：自律练习、战略性解决问题，以及追求超越最低要求的精通」。

paragraphs.en: “These are the same traits that define our Polymathic Domains — including Systems Thinking & Engineering, Computational Fluency, and Agentic AI Collaboration. USV believes mastery is mastery — whether expressed through code, art, design, or virtual worlds,” the site says.
paragraphs.cn: 网站称：「这些品质正是我们‘博雅领域’的核心，包括系统思维与工程、计算流畅性和智能体AI协作。USV相信，精通就是精通——无论通过代码、艺术、设计还是虚拟世界来体现。」

paragraphs.en: While achievements across quite a few games are up for grabs, the University tells students not to worry if their title of choice isn’t listed on the website; they can still submit it, as long as they include documentation of its rarity (specifically, a <5% completion rate), and an explanation of the mastery involved. The scholarship committee reviews all applications on a case-by-case basis.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管奖学金涵盖不少游戏，大学表示，如果学生选择的作品未列在网站上也不必担心，只要提交稀有度证明（具体为完成率低于5%）及对所需精通程度的说明，仍可申请。奖学金委员会会逐案审核所有申请。

paragraphs.en: This year marks the debut of the Max Achievement Scholarship, which aims to reward 10 - 15 students in the 2026 - 2027 academic calendar. Expansion of the program is subject to change based on the quality of applicants, as well as the program’s overall success.
paragraphs.cn: 今年是最高成就奖学金首次推出，计划在2026至2027学年奖励10至15名学生。项目是否扩大，将取决于申请者质量及项目整体成效。

paragraphs.en: This is far from the first time a University has turned heads with unusual academic offerings; in 2021, the University of Glasgow went viral for offering a philosophy course based on The Simpsons titled, ‘D'Oh! The Simpsons Introduce Philosophy.’
paragraphs.cn: 大学以独特学术项目引发关注并非首次。2021年，格拉斯哥大学就曾因开设以《辛普森一家》为基础的哲学课程而走红，课程名为《D'Oh！辛普森一家介绍哲学》。
